elements.text: ![Figure](figures/2PG_TXT_Press-Release-NIIF-Sells-Two-Road-Assets-To-Cube-Highways_page_001_figure_000.png)

elements.label: para
elements.text: Press Release

elements.label: sec_1
elements.text:
Cube Highway Trust Completes Acquisition of 2 Highway Assets in J&K from NIF, at a Transaction
Value of $4,185 Crores

elements.label: para
elements.text:
New Delhi, June 12, 2025 National Investment and Infrastructure Fund ("NIF") and Cube Heights Trust
("Cube InvIt") [NEE-BSE: CBECINVEST/543899], managed by Cube Heights Fund Advisors Pte. Ltd. (the
"Investment Manager / I/M") today announced the successful transfer of two operational Annuity Road projects
from NIF to Cube InvIT.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
The two assets being transferred, Quanzigou Expressway Pte. Ltd. (“QBT”) and Atangham Jammu Udupur
Highway Pte. Ltd. (“JU”), span approximately 80 kilometres and are located in Jammu and Kashmir. QBT is
one of the longest bi-directional tunnels in India, while JU is an essential link between Jammu and Srinagar.
These assets have a residual concession life of over six years and are backed by fixed semi-annual annuity
liabilities. The estimated useful life of such assets is calculated as a result of the incremental cash flows to
which are translated from traffic risks. The total Enterprise Value (including cash) of the two assets has been
reported at INR 4,185 crores, subject to all closing adjustments as specified in the SPA.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Vinay C. Sekar, CEO of Cube InviIt, said, "We are pleased to collaborate with NIF on this important
transaction. Today's acquisition will add to the high-quality pan-Julia portfolio and enhance the Trust's
business. Cube InviIt's committed to investing in and developing new products and services. This acquisition
showcases Cube InviIt's disciplined capital allocation strategy and prudent use of its balance sheet for
generating future growth. The expected return on investment will be active and strong in our
distributed cash flows by INR 2.3 per unit annually, on average, over the next five years."

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Pankaj Yasar, Group CFO of Cube InTcl said, "The strategic addition of these two completed and revenue-
generating annuity assets optimally complements our existing portfolio of assets and grows the annuity
exposure. Following this transition, annuity revenue will account for 35%/of Cube InTcl's total revenue.
We will also be able to provide critical services and solutions to meet our customers' needs." said Pankaj
Yasar, Cube InTcl remains well-positioned to pursue further value-acquisition activities.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Vined Giri, Manang Pati, Master Fad, NIfE, said, "This transaction reflects NIF's ability to undertake
complex transactions and acquire large infrastructure assets, de-risk them with a comprehensive plan, improve
user satisfaction, user surprise, prediction of user surprise, and increase user surprise. NIF is establishing an
owned road platform of NIF, in managing high-quality infrastructure assets with operational excellence,
technology, support, and processes. This track record enables us to deliver strong returns and attract
global institutional capital."

elements.label: sec_1
elements.text: About Cube Highways Trust

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Cuba Holdings Trust (“Cuba InVT”) is an invaluable Trust set up under the Indian Trusts Act, 1882 and
registered with the Securities Exchange Board of India (SEBI) as an Infrastructure Investment Trust. It is
backed by a diversified investor base, including I Squared Capital, a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Sub-
sidiary Fund, a joint venture partner of Cubana India Investment Management Corporation, and Abu Dhabi’s
sovereign investor Mahala Investment Company.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Cubana Heights Trust is engaged in implementing the public-private partnership ("PP") model in the
public-private sector to operate and manage highway projects in association with the central and state
governments.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
The Trust's AUM has grown to INR 32,266 Cross as of March 31, 2025, reflecting a 25% year-over-year
(YoY) growth and with the acquisition of these assets, The Trust's AUM is expected to grow to INR 36,451.
Cross. During FY25, Cube InVT declared an unearned yield of 11.48% and a cumulative distribution of
common shares were purchased at a total cost of INRs 1.79 billion. Over a 28.919 km/s line, Cube
InVT continues to be a leader among India's listed infrastructure investment trusts.

elements.label: sec_1
elements.text: About National Investment and Infrastructure Fund Limited (NIIF)

elements.label: para
elements.text:
JINF is a sovereign-linked alternative asset manager, anchored by the Government of India. With USD 4.9
trillion in total assets, JINF is the largest global investor bank across sovereign wealth funds, pension
funds, private equity firms, and development banks.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
By investing in commercially attractive sectors and asset classes that play a significant role in India's growth
story, NIF seeks to deliver superior returns over the long term. NIF operates across four strategy verticals:
Sustainable Infrastructure, Private Equity, Climate Investments, and Credit, catalysing global capital
through equity and structured debt.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
With a team of seasoned professionals, experienced in investments, asset management, and business
operations, NIFBuilds and operates high-quality assets and businesses that support India's economic

elements.text:
transformation. NIE is guided by a strong commitment to investment that generate positive environmental
conditions for society. NIE provides financial return through high-quality investing, best-in-class governance,
and robust asset management practices.
